creator: daved@tamu.edu
text:
Access to the IPMI module is lost when the driver attaches to the network
interface.  Access returns only when the network interface is enabled
(ifconfig up ...).

Fix: 

Unknown.  I can provide system with IPMI module and access (IP based KVM
and serial console) if needed to work out issues.
How-To-Repeat: Boot system with an IPMI module and em network card with a configured IPMI
module but networking not configured on the host.
